description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Azure Advisor is a personalized cloud consultant providing best-practice recommendations for cost, performance, security, reliability, and operational excellence across Azure deployments. The REST API enables programmatic listing, retrieval, and management of recommendations and configuration settings.
